title: Archetype
description: Base archetype schema for the statement payload of Archetype Ascriptions. The `schema` property defined here carries the governed JSON Schema content for the Archetype. The definition-manager publishes that content to the schema registry and assigns an envelope-level `schemaUri` outside this payload. Archetype extends Ascription and is the sole typed deliverable in the definition plane.

schema.description: The governed JSON Schema document (draft 2020-12+) defining the structure of instances typed by this Archetype. The definition-manager publishes this exact schema content to the schema registry and assigns an immutable envelope-level schemaUri for dereferencing. The schema MUST root, via allOf, at exactly one GSM base archetype schema.
